description_long: This object is a striking potted plant with long, slender, and highly dynamic leaves radiating outward in all directions. The leaves are multicolored, featuring shades of green, blue, and purple, giving the plant a vibrant and almost fantastical appearance. The base of the plant is anchored in a dark, irregularly shaped pot that appears to be made of a rough, stone-like material. There are some visible mechanical or metallic elements integrated into the pot, possibly as part of a decorative or structural feature. The plant's foliage is dense and wild, with some leaves curving and twisting dramatically, creating a sense of movement. The overall design suggests a modern or artistic interpretation of a potted plant, suitable for urban environments seeking a bold visual statement.
description: A vibrant, multicolored potted plant with long, twisting leaves radiating from a dark, rough pot, featuring some mechanical or metallic elements. The foliage is dense and dynamic, giving the plant a striking, artistic appearance.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full radial spread of the colorful, spiky leaves and the dense foliage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height and upward curve of the leaves, with the pot and mechanical elements partially visible.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the twisting, dynamic nature of the leaves and the integration of metallic features in the pot.
description_view_3: Another side view showing the elongated leaves extending outward and the irregular, dark pot base.
attribute_plant_species: fantasy ornamental (resembles Dracaena or spider plant)
